Better homepage story

Calm, close and practical — explained visually.

The page now moves like a proper agency concept: instant value, real property visuals, clear stay choices, confidence-building amenities and a frictionless enquiry path.

Stay options

Two paths, simple choice.

A strong homepage should make the accommodation decision feel simple before the user contacts the office.

On-site units

Best for residents who want the managed setting, shared facilities and convenient access to daily support.

FAQ

Questions answered early.

A good homepage reduces repetitive calls and improves lead quality.

The property is positioned very close to UniSC, making it practical for daily routines.

Yes. The form includes space for preferred room style, housemate needs or inspection timing.

The design is HTML/CSS/JS and can be converted into a WordPress theme, Elementor section or static landing page.

Yes. The front-end validation is included; it can be connected to PHP, CRM, Zapier or a booking platform.
